home.lead: Merge multiple RSS/Atom feeds into a single unique link, with black words filters and star words boosting.
home.open_existing_label: Paste a merged feed URL to edit it
home.options_import_text: Upload a JSON configuration to create a new master feed.
home.options_export_text: Enter a feed URL or token to export its JSON configuration.
source.name: Source name
target.title: Title
manage.unique_link_lead: This link is used for both RSS consumption and reconfiguration in the UI.
footer.create_instance: Create your Sympli RSS Fusion instance
privacy.title: Personal data management
privacy.lead: Sympli RSS Fusion runs in KISS mode and minimizes data collection.
privacy.section_data.title: Processed data
privacy.section_data.body: No account is required. Processed information is limited to your feed configuration (title, description, sources and filtering rules).
privacy.section_storage.title: Storage
privacy.section_storage.body: Configurations are stored locally in your SQLite database and XML cache files are kept in the app cache directory.
privacy.section_logs.title: Logs and traces
privacy.section_logs.body: In production mode, only operational errors are logged. In dev mode, technical details may be recorded for debugging.
privacy.section_rights.title: Your rights
privacy.section_rights.body: You keep control over your data: manual feed deletion, optional auto-purge and self-hosting on your own infrastructure.
